description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named test that runs on workflow dispatch, push to any branch except markdown files, pull requests except markdown files, and on completion of a Test schedule workflow run on the master branch. The workflow has read permissions for repository contents and pull requests. It has two jobs: test and deploy. The test job runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of Python 3.10, 3.11, 3.12, and 3.13, checks out the code, sets up Python, installs dependencies, and runs tests with coverage for Python 3.11. The deploy job runs on ubuntu-latest, needs the test job to succeed, and deploys to GitHub Pages on the master branch.
